rows.label: qev015103_MSG0001
rows.name:
Nice to meet you! My name is the
Blood Lobster! Your name is [ST:playername ]![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015103_MSG0002
rows.name:
I am deeply... ugh...! Deeply moved by
your hard work! As a reward, I'll tell
you anything you want to know right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015103_JNK0010
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev015103_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask who he really is.

rows.label: qev015103_JNK0020
rows.name: Doubt

rows.label: qev015103_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask him why he is doing this.

rows.label: qev015103_MSG0003
rows.name: I am... I am...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015103_MSG0004
rows.name: ...Your... father!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015103_MSG0005
rows.name:
Hah! It's simple! To bury
everything in hatred![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015103_MSG0006
rows.name:
...Say, before our battle, is there a need
for me to kill more and more of your friends
and comrades to heighten your emotions?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015103_MSG0007
rows.name:
Let's see... Alright, as a special
service, I'll kill that man named
Maurice. Now, my minions, bring him here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015103_MSG0008
rows.name:
...Just kidding!! It's a lie!!
Hyahahahahahahahahaha! Alright,
question time is over![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015103_MSG0009
rows.name:
All that's left is to settle things with
you. Then, everything will be rewarded![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015103_MSG0010
rows.name:
The ultimate weapon left behind by
those Definia... Try and overcome
the violence of the Blood Despair![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015103_MSG0011
rows.name:
...You win... Haha, you really were the
ally of justice exactly as I hoped.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015103_MSG0012
rows.name:
Why do you look so stunned... Did
you completely not expect this? Or
was it exactly as you predicted?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015103_JNK0030
rows.name: Unexpected

rows.label: qev015103_SEL0031
rows.name: Tell him you completely didn't expect Justin to be the culprit.

rows.label: qev015103_JNK0040
rows.name: As Expected

rows.label: qev015103_SEL0041
rows.name: Tell him you faintly realized Justin was the culprit.

rows.label: qev015103_MSG0013
rows.name:
That truly is the ultimate [System:Ruby rt=honor ]blessing[/System:Ruby]
for a scriptwriter. Well, that honesty
of yours is exactly your charm.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015103_MSG0014
rows.name:
What's this... Even though I specifically
contacted you right in front of your eyes
at the end, was it that obvious?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015103_MSG0015
rows.name:
I'm a failure as a scriptwriter... But,
that sharp insight is also your charm.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015103_MSG0016
rows.name:
You are truly wonderful...
Ahh... My heart is pounding![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015103_MSG0017
rows.name:
Just for this moment, I joined
hands with the Definia and
murdered innocent people.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015103_MSG0018
rows.name:
To become a villain worthy of you... To realize
the greatest drama of good punishing evil, and
to be killed by an absolute force of good...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015103_MSG0019
rows.name:
Now, let us bring this story to a close. The
one to bring down the curtain is you, the
single greatest force of good in this world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015103_MSG0020
rows.name:
Bury the Blood Lobster, who plunged NLA
into chaos, with the blade of justice![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015103_JNK0050
rows.name: Kill

rows.label: qev015103_SEL0051
rows.name: Pass judgment on Justin.

rows.label: qev015103_JNK0060
rows.name: Spare

rows.label: qev015103_SEL0061
rows.name: Let Justin go.

rows.label: qev015103_MSG0021
rows.name:
Ahh, yes! Those eyes! The strong will
to hate evil and defeat it! That is
exactly what I dreamed of... Justice's...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015103_MSG0022
rows.name:
...Ahh... It's the best...
My drama... is complete...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015103_MSG0023
rows.name:
Wh... Why!! I killed the
innocent people of NLA just
so I could be killed by you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015103_MSG0024
rows.name:
That's not all! I leaked Definia
weapons to criminals in NLA and
caused numerous chaotic incidents![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015103_MSG0025
rows.name:
Sometimes I even instigated vicious
murderers to cause incidents. All to make
a drama of good punishing evil a reality.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015103_MSG0026
rows.name:
See!? I'm a complete villain, aren't
I? There's no one as bad as me anywhere.
Kill me! Any method is fine![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015103_MSG0027
rows.name:
Hey... why!? Why won't you kill me!
The story won't end like this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015103_MSG0028
rows.name:
A villain like this being allowed to live
on... That's absolutely unacceptable!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015103_MSG0029
rows.name: Guh... ugh...! Ahhhhhhhhhhh!![ST:wait ]
